title: 菊花賞の後に・絆の勝利！

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: Super Creek takes it! It's a clean sweep!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Her spring woes are but a distant memory now!
The strongest Umamusume of them all has finally
bloomed!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: We did it, Trainer! We really did it!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I managed to bring you the Kikuka crown... Sniffle...
choice_data_list: Thanks, but this crown belongs to both of us!
Thanks, but this crown belongs to both of us!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Both of us...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: If the winner is the Umamusume with the strongest bond, then this victory belongs to us.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: You're right. It's not one of us who's won but both of us.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You've become stronger, and I've learned to trust
you with all my heart...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
We were able to win today because we worked
together hand in hand. This... is a true victory.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
This victory really does feel different from all the
others. We bask in the sensation for a while.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Oh, that's right! Can I do that thing I haven't had
the chance to do?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
You know, the reward thing I wanted to do during
the Sumire Stakes?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The time has finally come—on this grand stage, in
front of everyone!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Hehe! Who's a good trainer?! You are! ♪

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Thanks to you, I've finally become the
Umamusume I've always wanted to be.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Sorry for making you wait... And thank you for
being so patient.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I'm so proud of you and how capable you've
become.
choice_data_list:
I should be thanking you for fostering that
strength in me!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
We've learned so much together—things that will
make us the best of the best.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that she's won the Kikuka Sho, I'm sure
Super Creek has what it takes to race among the
seniors in the Grand Prix too!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: So, what should our next goal be?
choice_data_list: Let's head to Nakayama at the end of the year.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Nakayama?!

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
...Okay. I'm a little scared, but I want to face this
challenge with you.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Let's take on the Arima Kinen!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Phew. What took ya? Been waitin' forever to see
those skills!

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
Now we've finally got a superstar lineup for the
year-end race.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text:
You'll be facin' the best senior racer around, and
the uncrowned Classic champion.

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Right, Oguri?

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: That's right...

text_block_list.name: Oguri Cap
text_block_list.text: Yeah. I'm starving...

text_block_list.name: Tamamo Cross
text_block_list.text: Gah! You're completely off topic!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Super Creek's rivals have their sights set squarely
on her.
